description: CompositionBlue striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves, half buttoned placket, and embroidered brand logo on the chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanFriday dressing and Sports come together in this stylish and sauve polo T-shirt from puma.
